# logtail_dashboard_section (Resource)

This resource allows you to create, modify, and delete Sections in a Dashboard in Better Stack Telemetry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "logtail_dashboard_section" "performance" {
  dashboard_id = logtail_dashboard.production.id
  name         = "Performance"
  y            = 8
}

resource "logtail_dashboard_section" "errors" {
  dashboard_id = logtail_dashboard.production.id
  name         = "Errors"
  y            = 16
  collapsed    = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dashboard_id` (String) The ID of the dashboard this section belongs to.
- `name` (String) The name of this section.
- `y` (Number) The vertical position of this section in the dashboard grid.

### Optional

- `collapsed` (Boolean) Whether this section is collapsed.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time when this section was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this section.
- `updated_at` (String) The time when this section was updated.
